intro: Schmaltzia kearneyi, also known as Kearney's schmaltzia, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Burseraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its numerous health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may help alleviate symptoms associated with various conditions, such as arthritis and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Schmaltzia kearneyi include triterpenoids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
